name: aiherway
description: The AI Her Way AI Operating System: your AI departments, delivered as plugins that stay current.

plugins.name: optimise
plugins.description: Keep your AI OS sharp: Skills Health Check, Tool Stack Audit, and Hub Gap-Finder & Sync.

plugins.name: foundation
plugins.description: The shared spine every department uses: brand voice, brand check, voice check, citation check, and the responsible AI review.

plugins.name: marketing-os
plugins.description: Your AI marketing department: strategy, campaigns, content, email, social, and platform playbooks. Evidence-based and draft-and-approve.

plugins.name: admin-ops-os
plugins.description: Your AI operations department: inbox, calendar, meetings, tasks, SOPs, travel, and the weekly rhythm that keeps the business running.

plugins.name: home-os
plugins.description: The operating system for real life: family calendar, meal planning, chores, school comms, trips, and household admin.
